text:
X-Ray Goggles (スケルトンメガネ) a card found in the Greed Island game. It is one of the game's 100 designated slot cards and so is required for a player to complete the game. These glasses allow you to see through nearly anything.
__NOTOC__

Summary

X-Ray Goggles スケルトンメガネ - This card grants the user a pair of X-Ray Goggles. They can be used to see through any wall or object. A dial is available to adjust the vision depth. The only thing that these goggles can't see through, is a new pack of spell cards from Masadora.

Card Description

{| border="0" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="article-table" style="height: 10px; color: #1A004C; background-color: #EEFFEE"
![Jap]
|No.021 - スケルトンメガネ 
物が透けて見えるメガネ。メモリで強弱の加減が出来る。唯一魔法都市の呪文カードの袋だけは透かすことが出来ない。 
|-
![Eng]
|No.021 - X-Ray Goggles 
Glasses look through things. You can strengthen or weaken to the view. Can only not see through a bag of spell cards from the magic city.
|}

Trivia

According to Asta, using this object you can easily obtain the "Mystery Pond" and "Beauty Magnet Emerald" cards.
